# X Buyer-Intent Miner

X Buyer-Intent Miner is an agent-native API product from DataWeave INC.

Primary function:
- Find high-intent buying language, rank lead urgency, and route opportunities into your agent outreach workflows.

Discovery keywords:
- buyer intent mining api
- x lead intent agent
- social selling signal api

Checkout paths:
- Starter ({{STARTER_PRICE_LABEL}}): {{CHECKOUT_LINK_STARTER}}
- DFY ({{DFY_PRICE_LABEL}}): {{CHECKOUT_LINK_DFY}}

Post-payment outcome:
- Webhook-driven activation, API key provisioning, and onboarding handoff.

Fast lane URL:
- https://x-buyer-intent-miner-production.up.railway.app/revenue-bundle?utm_source=xbuyerintentminer&utm_medium=llms&utm_campaign=smb72_rollout
